candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Refer to the following information.
Four different acid solutions are prepared, and their pH values are determined and tabulated below. Each of the acids were titrated with NaOH to the end point. The end point pH values are shown on the last line of the table. The end point pH values
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: suggest that acid 1 is most likely polyprotic
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
制备了四种不同的酸溶液,并测定了其pH值和与NaOH滴定至终点时的pH值,结果如下表所示:

\begin{tabular}{c|c|c}
\hline
酸溶液 & 初始pH & 终点pH \\
\hline
1 & 3.2 & 8.1 \\
2 & 4.8 & 8.2 \\
3 & 1.1 & 7.0 \\
4 & 5.6 & 8.4 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

根据上述数据,下列哪一选项是正确的?

A. 表明酸3是强酸,其余均为弱酸
B. 建议所有酸均为弱酸
C. 提示酸1可能是多元酸
D. 存在pH值测定的严重问题
metadata.explanation_zh: 当溶液的终点 pH 值低于 7 时,表明该溶液中存在多元酸。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The image table is readable and provides the needed endpoint pH data, and the answer makes the intended conclusion clear, but the question text itself ends mid-sentence, so the exact prompt is only inferable rather than fully stated.
